title: Tech Immersion and Placement Programme (TIPP)
text:
Tech Immersion and Placement Programme (TIPP) - SupportGoWhere
Tech Immersion and Placement Programme (TIPP)
Share link
Immersive training bootcamp to prepare non-ICT professionals for ICT roles like web developers, user experience designers, and data analysts.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Prepare mid-career professionals for a career switch into tech
Mentorship and coaching from leading experts in ICT field
Subsidised course fee upon completion of the programme
Collapse all sections
About this support

Immersive ICT training courses or mentorship & coaching programmes that will lead to the creation of an impressive portfolio

Interact with leading experts

Enjoy subsidised course fees

Who is this for?

Individuals: Singapore Citizens who are non-ICT professionals and are interested in switching to ICT job roles

Companies: Singapore registered Institute of Higher Learning (IHL); or Private Education Institution (PEI) with a valid Enhanced Registration Framework (ERF) registered with SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) for the duration of the project qualifying period.

Other eligibility criteria varies by industry partner and course.

How to apply?

You can visit the list of eligible partners and courses and apply directly via the partners' website

Where can I find help?

View more details

IMDA Hotline: 6377 3800

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 19 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
